products.title_en: Handmade Crochet Clutch Purse for Summer Evenings, Woven Straw Style Handbag
products.title_tr: Handmade Crochet Clutch Purse for Summer Evenings, Woven Straw Style Handbag
products.description_en:
✨ Handmade crochet clutch purse designed for summer evenings, vacations and special occasions. Lightweight, elegant and crafted to complement any outfit.

A Handmade Bag You'll Reach for Again and Again

Some bags simply carry your essentials. Others become part of your favorite memories.

This handmade crochet clutch was created for women who love timeless style with a relaxed, natural feel. Whether you're heading to a summer dinner, a beach vacation, a wedding celebration, or simply enjoying a sunny afternoon with friends, this bag adds effortless elegance without trying too hard.

Every stitch is crocheted by hand in our small workshop, making each piece slightly unique and full of character. The neutral woven texture pairs beautifully with dresses, linen outfits, sandals, or evening wear, making it a versatile accessory you'll enjoy season after season.

Its lightweight design is comfortable to carry while offering enough room for your everyday essentials like your phone, wallet, keys, lipstick, and sunglasses.

If you're looking for a thoughtful handmade gift—or a special piece for yourself—this clutch is made to be cherished for years.

Product Details

👜 Handmade crochet clutch purse

📏 Size: 24 × 18 cm (9.4 × 7.1 in)

🧶 Carefully crocheted by hand

🤍 Fully lined interior

📱 Fits most smartphones

🔑 Room for daily essentials

🌿 Lightweight and comfortable

👗 Designed for everyday elegance

Perfect For

☀️ Summer vacations

🍽️ Dinner dates

🏖️ Beach holidays

💍 Wedding guests

🌸 Bridal showers

🎉 Special occasions

🎁 Birthday gifts

🎄 Christmas gifts

💖 Mother's Day gifts

Why You'll Love It

✨ Handmade with care

✨ Timeless woven texture

✨ Neutral color that matches almost everything

✨ Lightweight yet practical

✨ Elegant without being bulky

✨ Beautiful gift for someone special

Care Instructions

• Spot clean when needed

• Do not machine wash

• Lay flat to dry

• Store in a dry place

Gift Ready

Every order is carefully packaged with love, making it ready to gift from the moment it arrives.

Please Note

Because every bag is handmade, slight variations in stitch placement and texture are part of what makes each piece unique.

Colors may appear slightly different depending on your screen settings and lighting conditions.

products.title_en: Crochet Giraffe Plush Toy, Handmade Amigurumi Animal, Safari Nursery Decor
products.title_tr: Crochet Giraffe Plush Toy, Handmade Amigurumi Animal, Safari Nursery Decor
products.description_en:
🤍 This crochet giraffe plush toy is a handmade amigurumi companion designed to bring warmth, comfort, and a soft natural touch into your child’s room. Carefully crocheted with 100% cotton yarn, this long-legged giraffe is both a cozy cuddle friend and a charming nursery decor piece.

With its peaceful expression, minimalist safari style, and soft handmade texture, this giraffe makes a beautiful keepsake for babies, toddlers, and animal-loving little ones.

🦒 PRODUCT DETAILS

• Approx. 30–35 cm (12–14 inches)
• 100% cotton yarn
• Hypoallergenic fiber filling
• Fully handmade crochet craftsmanship
• Lightweight and easy to hold
• Soft and breathable texture

✨ Since each giraffe is completely handmade, slight variations may naturally occur, making every piece unique.

🌿 WHY PARENTS LOVE IT

• Soft natural cotton feel
• Cozy safari nursery companion
• Handmade with attention to every detail
• A timeless alternative to factory-made toys
• Decorative and functional at the same time

💝 PERFECT FOR

• Baby shower gifts
• Safari nursery decor
• Newborn keepsakes
• Toddler gifts
• Crochet animal collections
• First birthday presents
• Neutral nursery themes

🧼 CARE INSTRUCTIONS

• Machine washable at 30°C on gentle cycle
• Do not use fabric softener
• Do not use spin cycle
• Lay flat to dry naturally

🤍 HANDMADE WITH LOVE

Each giraffe is crocheted stitch by stitch with patience and care. No mass production — every giraffe has its own soft handmade personality and charm.

These handmade amigurumi curtain tiebacks are designed to turn an ordinary window into a soft and magical corner. With their cute animal design and gentle texture, they don’t just hold curtains — they bring life and personality into the room.

Each piece is carefully crocheted by hand, making every tieback unique and full of character ✨

products.title_en: Brown Straw Tote Bag, Handmade Woven Purse, Lace Bow Crossbody Bag for Women
products.title_tr: Brown Straw Tote Bag, Handmade Woven Purse, Lace Bow Crossbody Bag for Women
products.description_en:
There's a quiet elegance to a bag that's woven by hand, and this one has it in every detail. 🤍

Crafted from natural straw with the kind of patience that can't be rushed, this handmade tote bag carries warmth in its texture — rich golden-brown tones, a gently rounded silhouette, and rounded handles that sit beautifully on the shoulder. A delicate white lace bow softens the look, adding a romantic, refined finish that feels effortlessly put together.

This isn't an accessory you grab without thinking. It's the kind of straw bag that completes an outfit — worn with a linen dress for a summer luncheon, or with tailored trousers for a coastal evening out. The removable strap lets you wear it as a classic handbag or a relaxed crossbody, depending on the moment.
Sized at 13.7 × 11.8 inches (35 × 30 cm), it's generously roomy without losing its refined shape — easily holding your essentials while staying elegant in hand.

If you're searching for a handmade woven purse, a unique straw bag for women, or a meaningful gift for someone with discerning taste, this is the kind of piece that's chosen, not just bought.

🧶 Details:

Size: ~13.7 × 11.8 inches / 35 × 30 cm
Material: Natural straw
White lace bow detail
Removable strap — wear as handbag or crossbody
Capacity: 0–15 L
Clean with a damp cloth
Made to order — each piece is one of a kind

💬 Looking for something personal? A different bow color or a custom touch? Send us a message — we'll craft it with you in mind.

💡 Looking for the perfect bag or gift?
If you're searching for the best straw bag for summer, elegant woven handbags, handmade crossbody bags with lace bow, luxury straw purses, or a thoughtful gift for a woman who appreciates handmade quality — this bag is exactly what you're looking for. Woven by hand, one row at a time.

products.title_en: Crochet Teddy Bear in Overalls, Handmade Amigurumi Plush Stuffed Animal, Personalized Baby Gift
products.title_tr: Crochet Teddy Bear in Overalls, Handmade Amigurumi Plush Stuffed Animal, Personalized Baby Gift
products.description_en:
Meet the sweetest little companion made just for tiny hands and big hearts. This handmade crochet teddy bear is lovingly crafted from buttery-soft velvet yarn, giving it that irresistibly plush, cuddly feel that babies and toddlers adore. Dressed in charming brown overalls with real wooden buttons, this crochet stuffed animal is ready to become a treasured friend from day one.

Standing around 30–33 cm tall, this crochet teddy bear is the perfect size for snuggling, nursery shelves, and on-the-go adventures. The chunky velvet stitches make it wonderfully huggable, while the gentle face and classic overall design give it timeless teddy bear charm. It makes a heartfelt baby shower gift, a cozy newborn gift, or a sweet addition to any safari or woodland nursery decor.

✨ Two models available:

Standard model – the classic cream bear in brown overalls, exactly as pictured.

Customizable model – choose your own color combination and add a name for a truly personalized baby gift. Perfect for celebrating a new arrival, a first birthday, or a baby girl or baby boy in your life.

Each crochet amigurumi bear is made to order with care, so tiny variations make your piece one of a kind. As a handmade crochet toy, gentle hand washing is recommended to keep the velvet soft and the colors bright.
Whether you're searching for crochet gifts, crochet animal friends, or a keepsake crochet doll to pass down, this little bear is ready to bring comfort and smiles for years to come.

💛 Want it personalized? Leave the name and your preferred colors in the personalization box at checkout, and we'll create a custom bear just for you. Have a special request? Message us anytime — we love bringing your ideas to life!

Looking for a handmade crochet teddy bear as a personalized baby gift? This soft velvet stuffed animal in brown overalls can be customized with your baby's name and favorite colors, making it an ideal baby shower gift, newborn keepsake, or nursery decor piece for a baby boy or baby girl.

products.title_en: Crochet Kangaroo Stuffed Plush, Handmade Amigurumi Mom and Baby, Newborn Baby Shower Gift
products.title_tr: Crochet Kangaroo Stuffed Plush, Handmade Amigurumi Mom and Baby, Newborn Baby Shower Gift
products.description_en:
This handmade crochet kangaroo is one of those toys that tells a little story the moment you see it. 🦘💛

Crocheted stitch by stitch using 100% soft cotton yarn, mama kangaroo carries her tiny baby right in her pouch — just like in the wild. But here's the sweet part: the baby joey is actually a rattle, perfect for tiny hands to discover and shake. It's the kind of detail that makes this more than just a stuffed animal — it's a first toy and a keepsake all in one.

Standing about 13–15 inches (33–38 cm) tall, it's sturdy, huggable, and made to be loved for years.
Whether you're looking for a unique baby shower gift, a newborn gift, or something truly special for a baby girl or baby boy — this crochet amigurumi kangaroo delivers that "wow" moment every single time. 🤍

🎀 Choose Your Model:
Standard — Mama kangaroo just as you see her, natural and sweet. No bow, no name — ready to gift as is.

Customizable — Add a colorful bow and embroider your little one's name on the toy. A truly one-of-a-kind keepsake. Just send us the name and bow color after purchase! 💌

🎁 Perfect for:

Baby shower gifts & newborn arrivals
Baby girl gifts & baby boy gifts
Toddler gifts & first birthdays
Nursery decor & playroom companions
Anyone who loves handmade things

🧶 Details:

Size: ~13–15 inches / 33–38 cm
Material: 100% cotton yarn
Baby joey rattle included in pouch
Safety eyes (not suitable for children under 3)
Hypoallergenic polyfill stuffing
Surface wash recommended
Made to order — each one is unique 🤍

💬 Want something special? Choose the Customizable model and send us your child's name and preferred bow color — we'll make it just for you!
💡 Looking for the perfect gift?

If you're searching for the best baby shower gift, unique newborn gifts, handmade crochet toys for babies, cute stuffed animals with rattle, or a one-of-a-kind toddler gift for boys and girls — this little kangaroo family is exactly what you're looking for. Handmade, personal, and made with love one stitch at a time.

products.description_en:
This crochet teddy bear is a handmade amigurumi toy created as a soft nursery decor piece and meaningful personalized baby gift for newborns, toddlers, and growing little ones. Designed with 100% cotton yarn and carefully crocheted by hand, this teddy combines the cozy charm of crochet animals with the warmth of a timeless childhood keepsake.

Perfect as a baby shower gift, toddler gift, or newborn companion, this sleepy bear is made to bring comfort, calmness, and a soft decorative touch to every nursery. Whether displayed on a shelf or cuddled during bedtime, its gentle texture and peaceful design make it a lovable everyday friend.

🧸 SIZE OPTIONS

• Small Size: approx. 23–25 cm
• Large Size: approx. 28–30 cm

✨ Since every piece is fully handmade, slight size differences may naturally occur.

🎨 PERSONALIZATION & COLOR OPTIONS

You can choose your favorite outfit color from the available options shown in the photos.

Available colors include:

• Pink
• Yellow
• Blue
• Green
• Beige

👉 If you would like a personalized version or custom color combination, feel free to message us anytime.

• 100% handmade crochet craftsmanship
• Soft natural cotton yarn
• Hypoallergenic fiber filling
• Lightweight and easy to cuddle
• Suitable from newborn age and up
• A cozy alternative to mass-produced toys

💝 PERFECT FOR

• Personalized baby gifts
• Baby shower gifts
• Newborn keepsakes
• Toddler gifts
• Nursery decor
• Baby room styling
• Crochet animal lovers

products.title_en: Crochet Bunny Curtain Tiebacks, Handmade Amigurumi Rabbit, Personalized Baby Nursery Decor
products.title_tr: Crochet Bunny Curtain Tiebacks, Handmade Amigurumi Rabbit, Personalized Baby Nursery Decor
products.description_en:
🐰 I created these Crochet Bunny Curtain Tiebacks to bring a little extra warmth, charm, and personality into a child's room.

Each bunny is carefully crocheted by hand using premium cotton yarn and designed to do more than simply hold curtains. Their sweet expressions, soft dresses, and long wrap-around arms transform ordinary curtains into a charming part of your nursery decor while adding a cozy handmade touch to the room.

Whether you're decorating a nursery, updating a toddler's room, or searching for a thoughtful baby shower gift, these handmade bunny tiebacks combine functionality with beautiful craftsmanship.

Unlike mass-produced curtain accessories, every bunny is individually handmade and can be customized with your preferred outfit color to match your nursery theme.

🤍 Product Details

• Set includes 2 bunny curtain tiebacks

• Handmade with 100% cotton yarn

• Filled with hypoallergenic fiber filling

• Long flexible arms securely wrap around curtains

• Soft, lightweight, and durable

• Handmade from start to finish

• Designed for nursery and kids room decor

• Gift-ready packaging included

🎨 Personalization

Want a different outfit color?

Simply send us a message or leave your preferred color in the personalization box when ordering.

Example:

Green

Your bunny tiebacks will be made using the outfit color you request.

🧶 Why These Bunny Tiebacks Are Special

Every bunny is crocheted individually by hand using quality cotton yarn.

No factory production. No shortcuts. Just careful craftsmanship and attention to detail.

They are designed to be both practical and decorative, helping keep curtains neatly in place while adding warmth and personality to a nursery or child's room.

Because every piece is handmade, each set has its own unique character and charm.

🎁 Gift-Ready Packaging

Every order is carefully packaged with the same love and attention that goes into making each bunny.

Your curtain tiebacks arrive beautifully prepared for gifting, making them a wonderful choice for baby showers, newborn celebrations, birthdays, and nursery makeovers.

From the moment the package is opened, it is designed to feel like a thoughtful handmade gift.

🌸 A Wonderful Choice For

• Baby Nursery Decor

• Bunny Nursery Themes

• Kids Room Decor

• Baby Shower Gifts

products.title_en: Crochet Tiger Plush, Amigurumi Stuffed Animal, Safari Nursery Decor
products.title_tr: Crochet Tiger Plush, Amigurumi Stuffed Animal, Safari Nursery Decor
products.description_en:
🐯 Today I finished another Crochet Tiger Plush and I honestly can't stop squeezing those chunky little paws.

This Handmade Stuffed Animal is crocheted with incredibly soft velvet yarn and usually finishes between 35–40 cm (14–16 inches), depending on the natural handmade shaping of each piece.

I wanted this tiger to feel gentle and comforting rather than wild, so I gave it a sweet face, a soft body, and plenty of squish for everyday hugs.

Whether it ends up in a Woodland Nursery Decor theme, a playroom, or tucked into bed each night, I hope it becomes a friend that stays loved for years.

🤍 Product Details

• Approx. 35–40 cm (14–16 inches)

• Handmade crochet tiger

• Ultra-soft velvet yarn

• Hypoallergenic fiber filling

• Safety eyes securely attached

• Soft, cuddly, and lightweight

• Handmade from start to finish

🧶 A Little About My Tigers

Each tiger is crocheted individually by hand. I don't use mass production or factory-made parts. Every piece takes time, patience, and a lot of yarn.

Because they're handmade, no two tigers will ever be exactly the same, and that's one of my favorite things about creating them.

🎁 Perfect For

• Baby Shower Gift

• Birthday Gift

• Woodland Nursery Decor

• Safari Nursery

• Jungle Theme Room

• Animal Lovers

• Toddler Gift

• Keepsake Gift

🧼 Care Instructions

• Hand wash recommended

• Lay flat to dry

• Do not tumble dry

📌 Please Note

Small variations in size, shape, and details are part of the handmade process and make every tiger unique.

I just finished another Crochet Bunny Plush, and this one might be one of my favorites. Holding its tiny chick companion close, this sweet little rabbit was designed to bring comfort, smiles, and lasting memories.

Made with 100% cotton yarn, this Amigurumi Rabbit With Chick is more than a stuffed animal. Whether you're looking for a Personalized Baby Gift, a Baby Shower Gift, a First Birthday Gift, or a meaningful keepsake for a growing family, this handmade bunny was created to be treasured long after childhood.

products.title_en: Crochet Giraffe Plush, Safari Nursery Decor, Baby Keepsake Gift
products.title_tr: Crochet Giraffe Plush, Safari Nursery Decor, Baby Keepsake Gift
products.description_en:
🦒 I just finished another Crochet Giraffe Plush, and I can't help but smile at its gentle expression and long little legs.

This handmade giraffe is crocheted with 100% cotton yarn and designed to be more than just a stuffed animal. Whether you're looking for a Baby Keepsake Gift, a thoughtful Newborn Baby Gift, or a charming piece of Safari Nursery Decor, this giraffe was created to become part of a child's most treasured memories.

Measuring approximately 30–35 cm (12–14 inches), it's perfectly sized for nursery shelves, cuddles, playtime adventures, and everyday comfort. Soft, lightweight, and lovingly handmade, it brings warmth and personality to any nursery or playroom.

Every giraffe is individually crocheted by hand, making each one unique and special from the very first stitch.

🤍 Product Details

• Approx. 30–35 cm (12–14 inches)

• Handmade crochet giraffe

• Made with 100% cotton yarn

• Hypoallergenic fiber filling

• Safety eyes securely attached

• Soft and lightweight

• Handmade from start to finish

• Sold individually (1 giraffe)

🧶 Why This Giraffe Is Special

In a world full of mass-produced toys, I wanted to create something that feels personal and meaningful.

Every giraffe is crocheted slowly and carefully by hand. No factory production, no assembly lines—just traditional craftsmanship, quality materials, and attention to every detail.

Small variations in shape and expression are part of the handmade process and make each giraffe one of a kind.

Designed to be treasured long after childhood, this giraffe is both a comforting companion and a beautiful nursery keepsake.

🎁 Gift-Ready Packaging

Every giraffe is carefully packaged with the same attention and care that goes into making it.

From the moment the package arrives, it is designed to feel like a thoughtful gift, making it perfect for baby showers, birthdays, welcoming a new baby, or sending directly to new parents.

🧼 Care Instructions

• Machine washable at 30°C (86°F)

• Gentle cycle recommended

• Lay flat to dry

• Do not tumble dry

• Baby Shower Gifts

• Newborn Baby Gifts

• First Birthday Gifts

products.title_en: Crochet Tiger Plush, Handmade Stuffed Animal, Woodland Nursery Decor
products.title_tr: Crochet Tiger Plush, Handmade Stuffed Animal, Woodland Nursery Decor
products.description_en:
🐯 Today I finished another Crochet Tiger Plush and I honestly can't stop squeezing those chunky little paws.

This Handmade Stuffed Animal is crocheted with incredibly soft velvet yarn and usually finishes between 35–40 cm (14–16 inches), depending on the natural handmade shaping of each piece.

I wanted this tiger to feel gentle and comforting rather than wild, so I gave it a sweet face, a soft body, and plenty of squish for everyday hugs.

Whether it ends up in a Woodland Nursery Decor theme, a playroom, or tucked into bed each night, I hope it becomes a friend that stays loved for years.

🤍 Product Details

• Approx. 35–40 cm (14–16 inches)

• Handmade crochet tiger

• Ultra-soft velvet yarn

• Hypoallergenic fiber filling

• Safety eyes securely attached

• Soft, cuddly, and lightweight

• Handmade from start to finish

🧶 A Little About My Tigers

Each tiger is crocheted individually by hand. I don't use mass production or factory-made parts. Every piece takes time, patience, and a lot of yarn.

Because they're handmade, no two tigers will ever be exactly the same, and that's one of my favorite things about creating them.

🎁 Perfect For

• Baby Shower Gift

• Birthday Gift

• Woodland Nursery Decor

• Safari Nursery

• Jungle Theme Room

• Animal Lovers

• Toddler Gift

• Keepsake Gift

🧼 Care Instructions

• Hand wash recommended

• Lay flat to dry

• Do not tumble dry

📌 Please Note

Small variations in size, shape, and details are part of the handmade process and make every tiger unique.

products.description_en:
Daisy Crochet Hair Accessory Set featuring handmade floral headband clips and charming daisy hair accessories. Designed for babies and girls, this floral hair accessory set makes a beautiful baby shower gift and a sweet addition to cottagecore-inspired outfits.

Each daisy is carefully crocheted by hand using soft cotton yarn, creating a lightweight and comfortable accessory for everyday wear and special occasions. The delicate white petals and yellow flower centers bring a timeless floral look that pairs beautifully with dresses, party outfits, flower girl attire, and seasonal photoshoots.

### Available Variations

**Daisy Clips Pair*
A set of two handmade daisy hair clips for simple and comfortable styling.

**Daisy Pigtail Pair**
Two floral clips featuring crochet daisy flowers with decorative hanging vines for a whimsical cottagecore look.

**Daisy Headband**
A handmade floral headband decorated with crochet daisies for a charming and comfortable fit.

**Complete Set**
Includes:

* 2 Daisy Snap Clips
* 2 Hanging Daisy Clips
* 1 Daisy Headband

### Product Details

* Handmade crochet hair accessory set
* White daisy flowers with yellow centers
* Green crochet leaf details
* Lightweight and comfortable
* Suitable for babies, toddlers, girls, and children
* Perfect for baby showers, birthdays, flower girl outfits, photoshoots, and everyday wear

### Material

* Cotton Yarn
* Plastic Snap Clips
* Headband Base

### Care Instructions

* Hand wash gently when needed
* Lay flat to dry
* Do not bleach

Whether you choose the floral headband, daisy hair clips, or the complete hair accessory set, these handmade crochet flowers add a beautiful botanical touch to any hairstyle.


Looking for matching accessories or planning a baby shower, birthday party, or special event?

products.description_en:
Bring warmth, color, and handmade charm into your little one's room with this adorable crochet flamingo plush. Carefully handcrafted from ultra-soft velvet yarn, this charming pink flamingo is designed to become a beautiful nursery accent and a lovable keepsake for years to come.

Standing approximately 35–40 cm (13.8–15.7 inches) tall, it is large enough to make a statement on a nursery shelf, dresser, reading corner, or bed while remaining wonderfully soft and lightweight for cuddles.

Its elegant curved neck, fluffy wings, and cheerful pink color make it a delightful addition to flamingo-themed nurseries, baby rooms, and children's spaces.

🧶 Handmade crochet craftsmanship

🦩 Adorable flamingo design

☁️ Soft premium velvet yarn

🎀 Lightweight and decorative

(13.8–15.7 inches)

products.title_en: Crochet Bunny Plush, Handmade Rabbit Doll, Baby Nursery Decor
products.title_tr: Crochet Bunny Plush, Handmade Rabbit Doll, Baby Nursery Decor
products.description_en:
Crochet Bunny Plush, Handmade Rabbit Doll, Stuffed Animal for Baby Nursery Decor. This handmade crochet bunny plush adds a charming touch to nurseries, playrooms, shelves, and children's rooms while serving as a delightful decorative accent.

Looking for a unique crochet rabbit doll that combines adorable design with handcrafted quality? This bunny plush features long floppy ears, a delicate floral headpiece, and colorful overalls available in green, red, pink, blue, black, and lilac.

Carefully crocheted from soft velvet yarn, this handmade stuffed bunny is lightweight, durable, and ideal for nursery shelves, dressers, bookcases, and room decor. Its timeless white bunny design pairs beautifully with a variety of nursery themes and interior styles.

Each crochet rabbit is individually handmade with attention to detail, making every piece unique. The bunny remains classic white, while outfit and flower colors can be customized to suit your personal style or nursery color palette.

Features

• Handmade crochet bunny plush
• Soft velvet yarn texture
• Decorative rabbit doll design
• Floral headpiece detail
• Available in multiple outfit colors
• Suitable for nursery decor and shelf styling
• Lightweight and easy to display
• Handcrafted with attention to detail

Dimensions

Height: Approximately 28–30 cm (11–12 inches)

Material

• Velvet yarn
• Premium polyester fiber filling
• Safety eyes

Care Instructions

• Hand wash gently in cold water
• Lay flat to dry
• Do not bleach or tumble dry

Bring a little magic into your nursery with this handmade crochet unicorn plush. Carefully crocheted from 100% cotton yarn, this adorable unicorn is designed to become both a cozy companion and a beautiful nursery decoration.

products.title_en: Crochet Unicorn Doll, Handmade Amigurumi Girl, Rainbow Nursery Decor
products.title_tr: Crochet Unicorn Doll, Handmade Amigurumi Girl, Rainbow Nursery Decor
products.description_en:
🦄 This crochet unicorn doll is a handmade amigurumi girl designed to bring magic, color, and warmth into every nursery and playroom. With her rainbow hair, unicorn hood, tiny unicorn bag, and pastel outfit, she becomes a beautiful nursery decor piece as well as a soft cuddly companion for children.

Carefully crocheted by hand with premium cotton yarn, this doll is made for little dreamers who love whimsical and cozy handmade treasures.

✨ PRODUCT DETAILS

• Approx. 30 cm (12 inches)
• Handmade with 100% cotton yarn
• Soft hypoallergenic fiber filling
• Lightweight and easy to hold
• Detailed unicorn-themed outfit and accessories
• Rainbow hair and pastel handmade details

🌈 WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT

• Magical unicorn-inspired design
• Beautiful pastel nursery aesthetic
• Soft handmade texture
• Perfect for shelf styling and cuddles
• A unique alternative to factory-made dolls

💝 PERFECT FOR

• Baby shower gifts
• Birthday gifts

• Unicorn lovers

Crochet Duck Plush, Personalized Baby Gift - Handmade Nursery Decor

This crochet duck plush is a personalized baby gift designed to become a sweet keepsake for babies, toddlers, and cozy nursery spaces. Handmade with soft cotton yarn and customized with your chosen name, each duck is carefully crocheted to create a meaningful gift full of warmth and personality.

With its soft texture, timeless handmade design, and custom embroidered name detail, this adorable duck is perfect for nurseries, baby showers, birthdays, and special childhood memories.

• Head bow color options

Because every item is handmade, slight size differences are normal.

• 100% cotton yarn

• Hypoallergenic fiber filling

• Handmade crochet craftsmanship

• Safety eyes securely attached

Soft, lightweight, and comfortable for little hands to hold and cuddle.

• Personalized keepsake design

• Cozy nursery decoration

• Soft handmade texture

• Thoughtful alternative to factory-made gifts

• Beautiful baby shower present

• Timeless handmade character

Perfect for neutral nurseries, baby girl rooms, baby boy rooms, woodland themes, and cozy nursery aesthetics.

• Baby Room Decor

Crochet Bunny Doll designed as a soft baby gift, handmade amigurumi plush, and timeless nursery decor piece. Carefully crocheted with 100% cotton yarn, this long ear bunny is created to bring warmth, comfort, and gentle companionship into your child’s world.

With its floppy ears, delicate flower details, and soft handmade texture, this bunny becomes more than just a toy — it becomes a treasured keepsake for cuddles, playtime, bedtime, and nursery styling.

• Dress color

products.description_en:
🐰 A Beautiful Handmade Bunny Set for Little Ones

This adorable crochet bunny set is thoughtfully handcrafted to celebrate a baby's earliest moments. Designed with soft cotton yarn and delicate handmade details, it makes a meaningful baby shower gift, newborn keepsake, nursery decoration, or first birthday surprise.

Each set includes a charming crochet bunny doll, matching baby booties, and a coordinating handmade accessory, creating a timeless gift that families will treasure for years.

Perfect for nursery styling, baby photo sessions, welcome-home gifts, and special milestones.

What's Included

✨ 1 Handmade Crochet Bunny Doll
✨ 1 Pair of Crochet Baby Booties (0–6 Months)
✨ 1 Matching Handmade Bunny Accessory

All items are handmade individually.

Size

📏 Bunny Doll: approximately 25 cm (9.8 inches)

Because every piece is handmade, slight size variations may occur.

Materials

🧶 100% Cotton Yarn
🌿 Hypoallergenic Fiber Filling
🪡 Completely Handmade Crochet Work

Soft, breathable and comfortable for everyday nursery use.

Custom Color Options

🎨 Looking for a different color combination?

Custom color requests are welcome.

Simply send us a message before ordering and we'll gladly discuss available color options for the bunny, clothing, accessories and booties.

Perfect For

🎁 Baby Shower Gift
🎁 Newborn Welcome Gift
🎁 First Birthday Gift
🎁 Nursery Decor
🎁 Baby Room Styling
🎁 Pregnancy Announcement Gift
🎁 Keepsake Gift

Care Instructions

🧼 Machine washable at 30°C (86°F) on a gentle cycle

• Do not use fabric softener

• Do not use spin cycle
• Lay flat to dry

Important Note

Each item is handmade stitch by stitch, making every piece unique. Small variations in shape, stitching, or measurements are a natural part of handcrafted products and add to their charm.

The wooden ring accessory included in the set is intended as a decorative handmade accessory. Adult supervision is recommended whenever young children interact with handmade items.

products.title_en: Custom Crochet Bride & Groom Dolls, Personalized Wedding Gift, Handmade Couple Keepsake
products.title_tr: Custom Crochet Bride & Groom Dolls, Personalized Wedding Gift, Handmade Couple Keepsake
products.description_en:
🤍 Turn your real love story into a timeless handmade keepsake.

These custom crochet bride and groom dolls are carefully handmade from your photos and personalized details to create a truly meaningful wedding memory. Designed for wedding tables, engagement parties, bridal showers, home decor, and special keepsake collections, each couple is crocheted completely by hand with premium craftsmanship and attention to detail.

✨ Every order includes BOTH the bride doll and groom doll as a matching couple set.

Your dolls are customized according to the photos and information you provide:
• Skin tones
• Hair color & hairstyle
• Wedding dress details
• Suit style & colors
• Accessories & bouquet details

🧸 PRODUCT DETAILS

• Approx. 30 cm (12 inches) each
• Fully handmade crochet craftsmanship
• Soft premium yarn & hypoallergenic filling
• Lightweight and display-friendly
• Bride bouquet is removable
• Every piece is uniquely handcrafted

📸 HOW PERSONALIZATION WORKS

After purchasing, you can upload:
• Couple photos
• Wedding outfit references
• Hair & color preferences
• Special details you would like included

👉 The personalization box supports both text and image uploads.

⚠️ Please note:
These dolls are handmade art pieces inspired by your photos. Small handmade variations naturally make every couple unique.

🎁 PERFECT FOR

• Wedding gifts
• Bridal shower gifts
• Engagement gifts
• Wedding table decor
• Reception entrance decor
• Nişan & ceremony decor
• Anniversary keepsakes
• Couple gifts

🪵 OPTIONAL PREMIUM MDF DISPLAY BOX

We also offer a custom MDF glass display box option for a luxury presentation experience.

✨ Because this option is fully custom-made, please message us before ordering for details and pricing.

🧼 CARE INSTRUCTIONS

• Machine washable at 30°C
• Do not use spin cycle
• Do not use fabric softener
• Lay flat to dry gently

⏳ PROCESSING TIME

Each couple is made completely by hand and requires careful detailing.

• Production time: approximately 3–4 weeks

🤍 HANDMADE WITH LOVE

No factory production — every stitch is made patiently by hand to create a one-of-a-kind memory you can treasure for years.

products.description_en:

This crochet turtle plushie is carefully handmade using 100% cotton yarn and designed as both a soft cuddle companion and a charming nursery decor piece. Its cheerful expression, tiny shell details, and cozy handmade texture make it a meaningful keepsake for babies, children, and turtle lovers of all ages.

With customizable colors and optional hand-stitched names, each turtle becomes a truly personal handmade companion.

• Main Color

Names are stitched completely by hand using crochet yarn.
Because every piece is handmade, lettering may look slightly different from the example photos and may not appear perfectly symmetrical like machine embroidery. This is part of the charm and uniqueness of handmade craftsmanship.

• Lightweight and easy for little hands to hold

products.title_en: Crochet Curtain Tiebacks, Nursery Decor, Custom Animal Tiebacks
products.title_tr: Crochet Curtain Tiebacks, Nursery Decor, Custom Animal Tiebacks
products.description_en:
🦁 Every nursery has its own personality, and I wanted these Crochet Curtain Tiebacks to feel just as special.

Each animal is carefully crocheted by hand using soft cotton yarn and designed to hold curtains while adding warmth and charm to your child's room. From playful lions and giraffes to sweet bunnies, monkeys, deer, elephants, zebras, sheep, unicorns, and sloths, every tieback is made to become part of your nursery's story.

Unlike mass-produced curtain accessories, each piece is individually handmade and can be customized to match your room's colors and style.

Whether you're decorating a nursery, updating a toddler's room, or searching for a meaningful baby shower gift, these animal curtain tiebacks are designed to be both functional and beautiful.

🤍 Product Details
• Handmade crochet curtain tiebacks
• Made with 100% cotton yarn
• Flexible design fits most curtain types
• Soft and lightweight
• Long arms securely wrap around curtains
• Handmade from start to finish
• Gift-ready packaging included 🎨 Customization Options

Don't see the perfect color?
Most animals can be customized upon request.

Available customizations include:

• Body Color
• Mane Color (Lion)

• Ear Colors

• Outfit Colors (where applicable)

• Special Color Requests

🧶 Mix & Match Sets

Create your own combination.

Available options:

• Single Tieback

• 2-Piece Set

• 3-Piece Set

Choose matching animals or mix different animals together to create a unique nursery theme.

Examples:

• Lion + Giraffe

• Bunny + Deer

• Elephant + Zebra

• Lion + Bunny + Giraffe

• Monkey + Sloth + Zebra

🎁 Gift-Ready Packaging

Every order is carefully packaged with the same attention and care that goes into making each tieback.

Your order arrives beautifully prepared for gifting, making it a wonderful choice for:

• Baby Showers

• New Baby Gifts

• Nursery Makeovers

• First Birthdays

• Children's Room Decor

🌿 Why Parents Love Them

• Functional nursery decor

• Handmade craftsmanship

• Custom color options

• Mix and match animal combinations

• Soft cotton materials

• Unique nursery accessory

• Gift-ready presentation

📌 Please Note

This listing is for the quantity selected from the variation menu.

Because every tieback is handmade, slight variations in size, shape, and facial details are natural and make each piece unique.

Custom color requests are always welcome.

products.title_en: Crochet Animal Curtain Tiebacks, Amigurumi Nursery Decor, Handmade Curtain Holdbacks, Baby Shower Gift
products.title_tr: Crochet Animal Curtain Tiebacks, Amigurumi Nursery Decor, Handmade Curtain Holdbacks, Baby Shower Gift
products.description_en:
Transform your nursery with these crochet animal curtain tiebacks 🤍

These handmade crochet tiebacks are designed as both a functional curtain holder and a charming nursery decor piece. Perfect for baby room decor, safari nursery decor, or woodland decor themes, they add a soft handmade touch to any space.

Each amigurumi curtain tieback is carefully crafted using cotton yarn, creating a durable yet gentle nursery accessory that beautifully complements your nursery curtain setup.

✨ PRODUCT DETAILS

• Sold as a set of 2 pieces (1 pair)
• Handmade crochet (amigurumi technique)
• Flexible arms to wrap around curtains securely
• Soft, lightweight, and decorative

NOTE : If you choose “Custom Set – 3 Pieces”, please note that you will receive 3 individual curtain tiebacks (1 from each selected design), not pairs.

🧸 PERFECT FOR

• Baby room decor
• Nursery decor
• Safari nursery decor
• Woodland decor themes
• Kids room decor
• Baby shower gift

🐻 CHOOSE YOUR STYLE

Available in multiple adorable designs:
• Bunny
• Lion
• Bear
• Monkey
• Deer
• Giraffe

(Please select your preferred style from the variations menu)

🧵 HANDMADE QUALITY

Each curtain tieback is individually handmade.
No mass production — every piece has its own unique character.

• Gentle machine wash (30°C) if needed
• Do not tumble dry
• Lay flat to dry

products.title_en: Handmade Crochet Frog Plush Toy with Swim Ring, Woodland Nursery Decor, Gift for Kids
products.title_tr: Handmade Crochet Frog Plush Toy with Swim Ring, Woodland Nursery Decor, Gift for Kids
products.description_en:
Lovely amigurumi frog plush — a perfect soft cuddly toy for your child, a thoughtful newborn gift, or a charming nursery decor piece for a professional photo session. This handmade baby toy is meticulously crafted using 100% premium cotton yarn to create a durable plush companion that is natural and breathable.

Why this Amigurumi Frog is the ultimate Nursery Decor:

100% Cotton: We use high-quality cotton to create a handmade baby toy that feels gentle and premium, making it an ideal baby shower gift.

Artisan Quality: Every amigurumi frog is individually finished with love, ensuring a unique handmade gift that maintains its color and shape.

Playful Swim Ring Detail: Featuring a charming green frog with a signature yellow swim ring, this boutique toy adds a whimsical touch to any summer or pond-themed nursery.

📐 Product Specifications (Please Read Carefully):

Size: This crochet frog toy stands between 22–26 cm (8.5–10 inches), making it a perfect stuffed animal for little hands to hold.

Materials: Crafted with 100% premium cotton and stuffed with high-quality hypoallergenic silicone fiberfill for a soft, durable shape.

Variations: Because every stitch is made by hand, your frog plush will have its own slight, charming personality — the hallmark of a boutique handmade item.

🧼 Care & Washing Instructions:
To maintain the quality of your crochet plush, this toy is machine washable at 30°C (86°F) on a gentle cycle.

Important: Do not use the spin cycle and do not wring.

Drying: We recommend laying it flat on a level surface to air dry to preserve the natural cotton fibers and the silicone fiberfill shape.

Thank you for choosing our artisan amigurumi shop for your special occasion gift! Whether it’s for a first birthday or a woodland nursery theme, this cotton crochet frog is a guaranteed favorite.
